playlist.author: THE NEXT STEP
playlist.description: S01E01 - The Next Step Dance Studio is holding auditions for ten dancers in A-Troupe who could take the studio to Regionals this year. With the arrival of an amazing new dancer, no performer's spot is guaranteed.
playlist.title: Get The Party Started | The Next Step - Season 1 Episode 1

playlist.author: THE NEXT STEP PAGE
playlist.description: S01E02 - Everybody Dance Now: A-Troupe members are selected, but one of the best dancers does not make the cut. Emily is unhappy with the decision.
playlist.title: The Next Step - Season 1 Episode 2

playlist.author: THE NEXT STEP PAGE
playlist.description: S01E03 - Dance, Dance: The A-Troupe is divided into two teams to evaluate Emily and Michelle's leadership skills.
playlist.title: The Next Step - Season 1 Episode 3

playlist.author: THE NEXT STEP PAGE
playlist.description: S01E04 - Rock and a Hard Place: Kate asks Emily to conduct dance evaluations for placements in the group dance.
playlist.title: The Next Step - Season 1 Episode 4

playlist.author: THE NEXT STEP PAGE
playlist.description: S01E05 - Steal My Sunshine: Some dancers go to the beach while Emily and the E-Girls manage the studio's Dance Camp.
playlist.title: The Next Step - Season 1 Episode 5

playlist.author: THE NEXT STEP PAGE
playlist.description: S01E06 - Good Girls Go Bad: Emily convinces some of the A-Troupe dancers to spy on their main competition.
playlist.title: The Next Step - Season 1 Episode 6

playlist.author: THE NEXT STEP PAGE
playlist.description: S01E07 - Love Story: Emily agrees to go on a date with Eldon to heal his broken spirit.
playlist.title: The Next Step - Season 1 Episode 7

playlist.author: THE NEXT STEP PAGE
playlist.description: S01E08 - Just The Two Of Us: Eldon struggles to choose between Emily and Michelle as his partner for his performance.
playlist.title: The Next Step - Season 1 Episode 8

playlist.author: THE NEXT STEP PAGE
playlist.description: S01E09 - Just The Two Of Us: Eldon struggles to choose between Emily and Michelle as his partner for his performance.
playlist.title: The Next Step - Season 1 Episode 9

playlist.author: THE NEXT STEP PAGE
playlist.description: S01E10 - Road To Joy: To spend more time with Riley, James accompanies her to pick up costumes. Meanwhile, Stephanie has a photo shoot in Studio A.
playlist.title: The Next Step - Season 1 Episode 10

playlist.author: THE NEXT STEP PAGE
playlist.description: S01E11 - Can You Keep A Secret? Michelle learns the truth about Chloe's financial situation.
playlist.title: The Next Step - Season 1 Episode 11

playlist.author: THE NEXT STEP PAGE
playlist.description: S01E12 - Get It Together: Michelle secretly choreographs a new routine for Regionals.
playlist.title: The Next Step - Season 1 Episode 12

playlist.author: THE NEXT STEP PAGE
playlist.description: S01E13 - Don't Go Breaking My Heart: Emily begins to suspect that Michelle is up to something behind her back.
playlist.title: The Next Step - Season 1 Episode 13

playlist.author: THE NEXT STEP PAGE
playlist.description: S01E14 - Sabotage: Kate learns that Michelle has choreographed a different routine for Regionals.
playlist.title: The Next Step - Season 1 Episode 14

playlist.author: THE NEXT STEP PAGE
playlist.description: S01E15 - Changes: Emily and Stephanie struggle with Michelle as the new Dance Captain.
playlist.title: The Next Step - Season 1 Episode 15

playlist.author: THE NEXT STEP PAGE
playlist.description: S01E16 - Help: Everyone in A-Troupe auditions for row placements.
playlist.title: The Next Step - Season 1 Episode 16

playlist.author: THE NEXT STEP PAGE
playlist.description: S01E17 - Forget You: Emily struggles with what to do next after being put in the back row by Michelle.
playlist.title: The Next Step - Season 1 Episode 17

playlist.author: THE NEXT STEP PAGE
playlist.description: S01E18 - Brand New: A-Troupe decides to hold auditions for two new dancers to replace Emily and Stephanie.
playlist.title: The Next Step - Season 1 Episode 18

playlist.author: THE NEXT STEP PAGE
playlist.description: S01E19 - First Date: With a new A-Troupe assembled, the dancers decide to change the Regionals routine.
playlist.title: The Next Step - Season 1 Episode 19

playlist.author: THE NEXT STEP PAGE
playlist.description: S01E20 - We Are Family: Riley tries to make her relationship with Emily as sisters work out.
playlist.title: The Next Step - Season 1 Episode 20

playlist.author: THE NEXT STEP PAGE
playlist.description: S01E21 - Break Stuff: Giselle wants to make her mark in A-Troupe by performing a dangerous lift.
playlist.title: The Next Step - Season 1 Episode 21

playlist.author: THE NEXT STEP PAGE
playlist.description: S01E22 - Come Back ... Be Here: With Daniel leaving A-Troupe, Michelle and the team try and get Emily to come back.
playlist.title: The Next Step - Season 1 Episode 22

playlist.author: THE NEXT STEP PAGE
playlist.description: S01E23 - Dancing In The Street: When A-Troupe gets themselves into a dance battle with the street crew, Seeds, the team finds out that West was a former member.
playlist.title: The Next Step - Season 1 Episode 23

playlist.author: THE NEXT STEP PAGE
playlist.description: S01E24 - Price Tag: Chloe's financial problems finally boil over and she is forced to leave A-Troupe.
playlist.title: The Next Step - Season 1 Episode 24

playlist.author: THE NEXT STEP PAGE
playlist.description: S01E25 - Bad Moon Rising: Kate and Chris hold a party at The Next Step Dance Studio for the team to hang out not as dancers, but as friends
playlist.title: The Next Step - Season 1 Episode 25

playlist.author: THE NEXT STEP PAGE
playlist.description: S01E26 - Can't Fight This Feeling: The wrong costumes are delivered for Regionals and everyone is worried.
playlist.title: The Next Step - Season 1 Episode 26

playlist.author: THE NEXT STEP PAGE
playlist.description: S01E27 - I'm So Excited: A-Troupe heads to Regionals.
playlist.title: The Next Step - Season 1 Episode 27

playlist.author: THE NEXT STEP PAGE
playlist.description: S01E28 - Fancy Footwork: The Next Step studio hits the stage for the first time in their bid to win Regionals.
playlist.title: The Next Step - Season 1 Episode 28

playlist.author: THE NEXT STEP PAGE
playlist.description: S01E29 - This Is How We Do It: The Next Step studio must face Seeds in the semi-finals round of Regionals.
playlist.title: The Next Step - Season 1 Episode 29

playlist.author: THE NEXT STEP PAGE
playlist.description: S01E30 - Winner Takes All: The Next Step studio battles the Elite Dance Academy as the final two groups at Regionals.
playlist.title: The Next Step - Season 1 Episode 30
